title: Project Manager – Rail Structures (Contract)
description_raw:
Morson Group are seeking an experienced Project Manager for a rail structures programme in the Leeds/York corridor. The client is a Tier-1 civil and structural contractor delivering a series of NR-sponsored bridges, retaining walls, and tunnel lining refurbishment scopes.

You’ll be responsible for the mechanical interface management on this primarily structures programme — specifically the installation and commissioning of OLE (Overhead Line Equipment) support steelwork, cable management systems, and mechanical track drainage components that interface with the structural works.

Key activities:
- Chair bi-weekly mechanical interface meetings with OLE contractor and NR’s designated technical authority
- Maintain the mechanical interface register and resolve design clashes in the 3D BIM model (Revit/Navisworks)
- Manage the structural steelwork subcontractors for OLE mast foundations and bracket fixing
- Prepare weekly progress reports and maintain the programme’s critical path schedule

This role has been assessed by the client using HMRC’s CEST tool and has been determined to fall outside IR35. Contractors engaging via their own PSC (Personal Service Company) or a compliant umbrella arrangement are welcome.

Requirements:
- Minimum 5 years’ rail structures or infrastructure PM experience
- Good understanding of OLE mechanical interfaces and NR Electrification standards
- PRINCE2 Practitioner or APM PMQ
- CSCS Gold Card (or NVQ Level 6 equivalent)

Rate: £700 per day
Duration: 8 months from start
Start: 1 August 2026
